hero.title: Precision Urban Mining
hero.subtitle: We are not just a pickup service. We are your strategic sustainability partner to turn electronic waste into measurable assets and friction-free REP compliance.
hero.differentiator: The only manager in Chile that shows you every step — from collection to recovered material.

valueProps.title: Why ElectroLoop?
valueProps.subtitle: Not just another manager. The only WEEE-exclusive specialist with auditable traceability and certified data destruction in Chile.

cards.title: 100% WEEE-focused
cards.desc: We don't manage generic industrial waste or operate as a division of another business. ElectroLoop exists exclusively for electronic recycling — and it shows in every process.

cards.title: Certified data destruction
cards.desc: Secure erasure or physical media destruction. Individual certificate per serial number, valid for compliance audits and normative reporting.

cards.title: Traceability you can audit
cards.desc: Not just a certificate at the end. Real-time digital tracking of every component, with downloadable reports ready for your REP audit or ESG report.

cards.title: REP partner, not just vendor
cards.desc: We manage your full REP obligation: registration, reporting, and audits included. You focus on your business and we close the loop.

strip.title: Authorized Manager — Chile Ministry of the Environment
strip.desc: Compliant with REP Law N°20.920, Decree 148 on hazardous waste, and SEREMI Health authorizations.

chain.badge: Full transparency — what no one else shows you
chain.title: Your equipment arrives here. Here's what happens next.
chain.subtitle: While others hand you a certificate at the end, we show you every step of the journey. Total control from start to finish.

steps.title: Pickup at your premises
steps.desc: We coordinate collection at your facility with certified fleet, transport manifests, and a signed receipt. You get immediate confirmation.

steps.title: Certified reception & weighing
steps.desc: Every WEEE item is weighed, photographed, and entered into our traceability system with a unique serial number. You receive an intake report within 24 hours.

steps.title: Certified data destruction
steps.desc: Secure erasure or physical media destruction. Individual certificate per device with serial number, method, and date, valid for compliance audits.

steps.title: Dismantling & sorting
steps.desc: Manual and mechanical separation of components: ferrous metals, copper, aluminum, circuit boards, plastics, and hazardous materials.

steps.title: Material recovery
steps.desc: Recovery of copper, gold, silver, palladium, aluminum, and engineering plastics. Materials re-enter the productive cycle as secondary raw materials.
steps.tag: Materials return to the productive cycle

steps.title: Certificate in your inbox
steps.desc: Digital certificate of final disposal, material recovery report, and environmental impact metrics (CO₂ avoided, kg recovered). Ready for your ESG report or REP audit.
steps.tag: Valid for ESG and REP reporting

cta.title: Ready to see the process in action?
cta.subtitle: Schedule your first collection and receive your certificate within 5 business days.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Full WEEE management with certified data destruction, auditable traceability, and REP compliance — all in one partner.

items.title: Collection, Logistics & Data Destruction
items.desc: Scheduled pickup at your facility with own fleet and certified manifests. Every device receives secure erasure or physical media destruction, with an individual certificate per serial number, valid for compliance audits.

items.title: Treatment & Recovery
items.desc: Dismantling, sorting and processing of electronic waste with recovery of precious metals and reusable materials. Materials re-enter the productive cycle as secondary raw materials.

items.title: REP Management & Reporting
items.desc: We manage your REP obligation as a producer: from registration in the registry to annual reports to the Ministry of Environment. We simplify your regulatory compliance.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: A transparent, certified process from start to finish

steps.title: Collection
steps.desc: We coordinate WEEE pickup at your facility with our own fleet and certified transport manifests.

steps.title: Classification
steps.desc: Reception, weighing and categorization of equipment by type, composition and condition at our facilities.

steps.title: Pre-treatment
steps.desc: Decontamination, safe extraction of hazardous components (batteries, refrigerants, screens) with certified protocols.

steps.title: Recovery
steps.desc: Separation and refining of precious metals and materials with value. Referral to specialized recyclers by material type.

steps.title: Certification
steps.desc: Issuance of final disposal certificates and auditable reports for REP compliance and sustainability programs.

sectors.title: Sectors That Trust Us
sectors.subtitle: We serve organizations across multiple industries with tailored solutions

items.name: Mining
items.desc: Management of tech equipment, sensors, servers and control systems in mining operations.

items.name: Energy
items.desc: Collection and recovery of inverters, photovoltaic panels, batteries and substation equipment.

items.name: Government
items.desc: REP compliance support for public agencies, municipalities and government institutions.

items.name: Retail
items.desc: Mass collection programs for consumer electronics for retailers and producing brands.

items.name: Telecommunications
items.desc: Recycling of network equipment, antennas, modems, cables and telecom hardware.

items.name: Manufacturing
items.desc: Disposal of industrial electronic waste, decommissioned production lines and spare parts.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.subtitle: We operate within Chile's most rigorous regulatory framework
compliance.description: REP Law (Law N° 20.920) establishes extended producer responsibility for the management of waste electrical and electronic equipment (WEEE). ElectroLoop is an Authorized Manager registered in the Ministry of Environment's Manager Registry, meeting all required technical, environmental and safety standards.
certifications: Waste Manager Registry — Ministry of the Environment
compliance.badge: Authorized Manager — Ministry of the Environment

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Pioneers in urban mining and circular economy in Chile
about.description: ElectroLoop was born from the conviction that electronic waste is an untapped urban mine. We combine process engineering, traceability technology and regulatory expertise to transform WEEE into valuable resources, actively contributing to the transition toward a circular economy in Chile and Latin America.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your electronic waste management needs and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
